betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Steel & Titanium Armor§f

§aYour first proper combat armor sets.§f

§6Steel Armor§f: 7.5 defense, 0.04 RR, 0.9 damage modifier. Standard issue, requires Steel Ingots.
§6Titanium Armor§f: 10 defense, 0.04 RR, 0.85 damage modifier. Upgrade from steel.

Also covers: Casual Armor (cloth), Security Armor (Kevlar + Steel + Bakelite), Fire Proximity Armor (heat work).

§eTip§f: Titanium needs the Blast Furnace. Steel armor is good enough until you reach Cobalt.
